body:
This PR adds functions needed to run a simulation of ClimateMachine.jl with EKP.jl, as well as bash scripts for parallel runs of ClimateMachine.jl within each ensemble. The bash scripts assume the use of a SLURM workload manager (e.g. Caltech Central HPC).

The simulation chosen in this case is a stable boundary layer simulation using a one-dimensional anelastic Atmos model. This example is not self-contained, in that it requires installation of ClimateMachine.jl, similarly to the Cloudy.jl example.
title: Add ClimateMachine example
